zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Adams於1662年出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆格林藍德時，她的父親Samuel Adams15歲，母親Jane Anderson15歲。她於大約1686年與Edward Peavey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1731年5月2日在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆聶文頓聶文頓 斯塔享年69歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆聶文頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Adams于1662年出生在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆格林藍德时，她的父亲Samuel Adams15岁，母亲Jane Anderson15岁。她于大约1686年与Edward Peavey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1731年5月2日在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆聶文頓聶文頓 斯塔享年69岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆聶文頓。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Umberto, Aldo, Giulio, Paolo, Primo, Silvio.
German: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name Adam , from Adami, the Latin genitive. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name   Adamo  . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Adams was born in 1662, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, her father, Samuel Adams, was 15 and her mother, Jane Anderson, was 15. She married Edward Peavey about 1686, in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 2 May 1731, in Newington Station, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 69, and was buried in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Adams est née en 1662, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, Samuel Adams, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Jane Anderson, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Peavey environ 1686, à Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1731, à Newington Station, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rachel Adams 1662 in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Adams 15 und ihre Mutter Jane Anderson 15. Sie hat um 1686 in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Edward Peavey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1731 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Newington Station, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Adams è nata il nel 1662 nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Samuel Adams, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Jane Anderson, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Edward Peavey circa 1686, nel Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1731, nel Newington Station, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Adamsが1662年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムグレエンランドで生まれた時，父Samuel Adamsは15歳，母Jane Andersonは15歳であった。約1686年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムニューイントンでEdward Peaveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1731年5月2日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムニューイントンニューイントン スタティオンで69歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムニューイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드

ko.Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함
ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Adams(이)가 1662년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 그린랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Adams(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Anderson(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1686년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 뉴잉턴에서 Edward Peavey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1731년 5월 2일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 뉴잉턴 뉴잉턴 스태티언에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 뉴잉턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Adams nasceu em 1662, em Greenland, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Samuel Adams, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Jane Anderson, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Peavey aproximadamente 1686, em Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1731, em Newington Station, Newington, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Newington, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Adams родилась в 1662 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Samuel Adams было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Anderson, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Peavey около 1686 г. в местности нюингтон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 2 мая 1731 г. в местности нюингтон статион, нюингтон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности нюингтон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rachel Adams nació en 1662, en Greenland, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, su papá, Samuel Adams, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Jane Anderson, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Edward Peavey aproximadamente 1686, en Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1731, en Newington Station, Newington, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Newington, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
